title: Teachers' pay grant: allocations for 2019 to 2020 financial year
body: "The ‘Teachers’ pay grant April 2019 to March 2020 allocations’ document shows the allocations for the period April 2019 to March 2020.  The grant covering the 2019-20 financial year is paid in two instalments, the first of which has been paid and covered April 2019 to August 2019. The second covers September 2019 to March 2020.  Read the ‘Teachers’ pay grant April 2019 to March 2020 allocations: supporting information’ for detail about how schools will receive the grant and the data we’ve used in the grant calculations.  The ‘Teachers’ pay grant April 2019 to March 2020: conditions of grant’ document explains the terms and conditions that schools must follow in the use of this grant.  We’ve published detail of the rates and high level methodology for the teachers’ pay grant for 2018 to 2019 and 2019 to 2020.  You can also view the teachers’ pay grant allocations for September 2018 to March 2019. "
